question: How many likes does Kyle have?
gold_sql: SELECT count(*) FROM Likes AS T1 JOIN Highschooler AS T2 ON T1.student_id  =  T2.id WHERE T2.name  =  "Kyle"
predicted_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM likes JOIN highschooler ON likes.col_2 = highschooler.col_1 WHERE highschooler.col_2 = 'Kyle'
raw_response: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM likes JOIN highschooler ON likes.col_2 = highschooler.col_1 WHERE highschooler.col_2 = 'Kyle'
